formatted_display: English: Tuesday, 16 June 2026 | Nepali: Tuesday, 02 Asar 2083
quote: Hope itself is like a star- not to be seen in the sunshine of prosperity, and only to be discovered in the night of adversity.
formatted_quote: "Hope itself is like a star- not to be seen in the sunshine of prosperity, and only to be discovered in the night of adversity." - Charles Spurgeon
